Metadata.description: Log your movie and book records in 10 seconds without sign-up. Build your own timeline easily.

About.title: About Service & How to Use
About.subtitle: Movie & Book Timeline without sign-up
About.description: ottline helps you quickly log movies and books into your own timeline. Start on the web without tedious sign-up, then continue through the same flow on the installable PWA, Toss in-app mini app, browser extension, and Windows app. Android and ChatGPT connections are still in preparation.
About.pairingHighlightTitle: Once you start logging, your timeline keeps going.
About.pairingHighlightDesc: Whether you open ottline on the web, in Toss, or as an installed app, your pairing code lets you continue the same timeline and keep logging and checking your history.
About.platformsTitle: Started on the web, opened in more places
About.platformsDesc: The web timeline remains the center of ottline. Around that core, the same logging flow is available through several entry points.
About.platformWebDesc: Use it directly in the browser, then install it on your home screen or desktop to reopen it like an app.
About.platformTossDesc: Open your OTT timeline directly inside Toss without installing another app.
About.platformExtensionDesc: A helper that reads the title from supported OTT pages and sends you into ottline QuickLog on the web. It is currently available on the Chrome Web Store.
About.platformWindowsDesc: The same web app is also available through Microsoft Store packaging, so the desktop flow stays familiar.
About.platformAndroidDesc: Google Play release is still in preparation. Once public, it will support quicker entry from the home screen and widget.
About.platformChatGptDesc: A read-only ChatGPT connection is still in preparation for bringing recent logs into the conversation.
About.step1Desc: Search for movies, series, or book titles at the top of the home screen.
About.step2Desc: Choose whether you are watching, reading, or finished, and leave a light rating.
About.step3Desc: Your own timeline is built immediately upon saving. All data is securely stored in your browser first.
About.tip1Desc: ottline can be used like an installed app. Add it to your home screen to open quickly with an icon.
About.tip2Desc: You can download your records as a CSV in Settings and organize them in Excel or Spreadsheet.
About.tip3Desc: Select "Create Share Card" after saving a record to automatically generate a beautiful card for social media.
About.closing: "Memories fade, but records remain on the timeline."

Offline.title: You are offline

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Find answers about data storage and sign-up free usage of ottline.
FAQ.q1: Q. How is data kept without sign-up?
FAQ.a1: ottline uses Local-first technology. All records are first stored in your browser's internal storage (IndexedDB). Your data remains safe as long as you use the same device, even without an account.
FAQ.q2: Q. Can I see my records on a different device?
FAQ.a2: Yes! By entering the Pairing Code issued in the [Account] menu into a new device, you can continue to see your records. Data from multiple devices will be merged into one.
FAQ.q3: Q. How is data merged after pairing?
FAQ.a3: If there are records for the same title on both sides, the most recently updated content remains. This naturally keeps your timeline up to date without losing records.
FAQ.q4: Q. How do I delete records?
FAQ.a4: Individual record deletion is not supported, but you can remove synced account data at once in Settings > Delete All Server Data. If you only want to clear the current device, use Settings > Reset Local.
FAQ.q5: Q. Can I download my records?
FAQ.a5: Yes. You can download a CSV file in Settings > Export My Logs and organize it in Excel or Spreadsheets.
FAQ.q6: Q. Is there a usage fee?
FAQ.a6: ottline provides all features for free. Just focus on the joy of logging!

PwaInstall.title: Add to Home Screen
PwaInstall.iosDesc: Tap the Safari share button and select "Add to Home Screen" to use it like an app.
PwaInstall.androidDesc: Install to open quickly from your home screen.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: ottline ("the Service") values your privacy and complies with relevant laws. This policy guides you through the items of information processed, purposes, storage methods, and user rights.
Privacy.section1List:
• Log Data: Title, status, rating, note, timestamp
  • Service Operation: Device type, browser, OS, PWA installation status
  • Identifiers: Internal identifiers for sync and pairing
Privacy.section2List:
• Storing/viewing records, building timelines, providing sync
  • Error analysis and service stability improvement
  • UX improvement through usage analysis
Privacy.section3List:
• Information is destroyed without delay when purposes are achieved or upon user request.
  • In case of legal retention obligations, it is kept only for the required period.
Privacy.section4Desc: The Service does not sell user information to third parties and does not disclose it except when required by law.
Privacy.section5Desc: Users may request access, correction, or deletion of their data. This can be done through Settings > Delete All Server Data or by contacting the operator.
Privacy.section6Desc: Please submit privacy-related inquiries through our service channels. We will process them without delay after verification.
